description_long: This is a classic ring-shaped donut with a thick layer of white icing covering the top surface, adorned with colorful cylindrical sprinkles in shades of blue, yellow, orange, and pink. The donut itself has a soft, slightly puffy appearance, with a light pink base that wraps around the sides and bottom. A noticeable bite has been taken out of one side, revealing the fluffy interior texture. The icing appears smooth and slightly matte, with the sprinkles adding a playful, festive touch. There is no visible packaging or branding, and the donut is presented alone, as if ready to be picked up and eaten. The overall look is inviting and whimsical, reminiscent of a bakery treat or a playful urban snack.
description: A ring-shaped donut with white icing, colorful sprinkles, and a pink base, featuring a visible bite taken out of one side. The surface is smooth and festive, with no packaging or branding present.
description_view_0: Front view showing the donut's white icing, colorful sprinkles, and a large bite taken out of the upper right side.
description_view_1: Rotated view highlighting the bitten section more prominently, with the pink base and icing edge clearly visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the bite mark on the left, showing the smooth transition between the white icing and pink base.
description_view_3: Another angled view with the bite mark on the right, emphasizing the donut's round shape and sprinkle distribution.
attribute_icing_type: White sugar icing, smooth and matte, covering the top surface.
attribute_topping_type: Colorful cylindrical sprinkles in blue, yellow, orange, and pink.
